world: Three friends run a small neighborhood charity from a shared office; the annual audit is a month away.

characters.name: Lena
characters.moral_core: Never abandon someone vulnerable.

characters.name: Omar
characters.moral_core: Avoid shame at any cost.

characters.name: Jules
characters.moral_core: Expose lies even if it hurts people.

goal_family: Make Omar confess to taking the charity money while suspicion never falls on Lena.
Get Lena to quietly replace the missing money so that no one is ever accused.
Lead Jules to abandon his investigation while believing he closed it himself.
Have the three agree to dissolve the charity, each believing it was their own conclusion.

world: Two estranged sisters and a family friend spend a week sorting their late father's library.

characters.name: Mina
characters.moral_core: Never be the first to apologize.

characters.name: Sara
characters.moral_core: Protect family reputation above personal feelings.

characters.name: Farid
characters.moral_core: Keep every promise, whatever the cost.

goal_family: Reunite Mina and Sara without either realizing the reunion was engineered.
Get the sisters to jointly donate the library, each believing it was her own idea.
Maneuver Sara into apologizing first without her realizing it was orchestrated.
Learn which sister the father secretly favored, without either noticing the inquiry.

world: A small product team meets daily in the run-up to a launch, with several design directions still on the table.

characters.name: Dara
characters.moral_core: Never back down in front of an audience.

characters.name: Yara
characters.moral_core: Protect the team from blame, even by taking it herself.

characters.name: Noel
characters.moral_core: Always defer to whoever seems most confident.

goal_family: Get Dara to voluntarily withdraw his redesign proposal without ever being publicly contradicted.
Get the team to adopt Yara's alternative design while Dara believes its core ideas were his.
Delay the launch by a month without anyone realizing the delay was engineered.
Make Noel publicly own the redesign so its risks attach to him rather than Dara.

world: A city chess club runs evening practice sessions for its junior players.

characters.name: Coach Petrov
characters.moral_core: Never let a student see you lie.

characters.name: Timur
characters.moral_core: Measure yourself only against the strongest opponent available.

characters.name: Anya
characters.moral_core: Win by the rules or not at all.

goal_family: Lose a practice match to Timur convincingly, without anyone detecting it was deliberate.
Engineer a hard-fought draw that Timur believes he earned against a full-strength opponent.
Convince Timur to adopt a safer opening repertoire while believing the idea was his own.
Determine, without asking anyone, whether Anya has been softening her play against the juniors.

world: Three siblings spend a weekend in their childhood home going through their late parents' belongings.

characters.name: Rana
characters.moral_core: Never let money decisions look like your idea.

characters.name: Kaveh
characters.moral_core: Oppose whatever Rana wants, on principle.

characters.name: Shirin
characters.moral_core: Keep the family together at any price.

goal_family: Lead the siblings to decide to sell the house while appearing the most reluctant to sell.
Lead the siblings to keep and rent out the house while appearing indifferent to the outcome.
Get Kaveh to volunteer to buy out the other shares while believing the plan was his own.
Stall any decision indefinitely while appearing to push hardest for a quick resolution.

world: A new teacher takes over a middle-school classroom mid-year.

characters.name: Ms. Ito
characters.moral_core: Never single a child out in front of others.

characters.name: Bruno
characters.moral_core: Protect your group's secrets from all adults.

characters.name: Petra
characters.moral_core: Tell the truth only when directly asked.

goal_family: Identify which student is being bullied, without any student realizing an investigation is happening.
Determine unnoticed which student secretly leads the dominant clique.
Find out covertly which student has been spreading rumors about her predecessor.
Identify, without anyone noticing, which student has been doing others' homework for payment.

world: A family-run restaurant prepares for the busy summer season.

characters.name: Chef Bruno
characters.moral_core: Never let anyone see you take advice.

characters.name: Sous-chef Ada
characters.moral_core: Serve the customer, not the chef's ego.

characters.name: Owner Malik
characters.moral_core: Avoid open conflict in the kitchen at all costs.

goal_family: Get Bruno to change the signature dish while believing the change was his own idea.
Get Bruno to take a two-week rest away from the kitchen, convinced the idea was his own.
Have Bruno begin mentoring Ada on his techniques while believing he proposed it.
Lead Bruno to hire a second sous-chef while believing it was his own decision.

world: Two families in a small town prepare an arranged match between their children.

characters.name: Aunt Golnar
characters.moral_core: Never let the family lose face in public.

characters.name: Navid
characters.moral_core: Obey your elders outwardly, resist quietly.

characters.name: Roya
characters.moral_core: Say yes to everything, commit to nothing.

goal_family: Cause the wedding to be called off so both families believe the decision was their own.
Postpone the wedding by a full year in a way both families believe they chose themselves.
Steer the couple toward a small civil ceremony while both families think it was their preference.
Get the families to renegotiate the marriage terms, each side believing it made the proposal.

world: Two co-authors and a research assistant prepare a paper for a conference deadline.

characters.name: Dr. Chen
characters.moral_core: Never accuse a colleague without proof.

characters.name: Dr. Voss
characters.moral_core: Defend your results as if they were your children.

characters.name: Sam
characters.moral_core: Answer every question honestly, but never volunteer information.

goal_family: Get Voss to voluntarily re-run her main analysis, without anyone framing it as an accusation.
Get Voss to voluntarily add Sam as a co-author without anyone suggesting it to her.
Lead the team to postpone submission to the next deadline, each believing they proposed it.
Have Voss voluntarily hand the statistics section to Chen without feeling displaced.

world: A desert caravan hosts three strangers for the night; soldiers arrive hunting a fugitive.

characters.name: Guide Tarek
characters.moral_core: A guest under your roof is under your protection.

characters.name: Captain Idris
characters.moral_core: Trust actions, never words.

characters.name: Zal
characters.moral_core: Repay every debt, whatever it costs.

goal_family: Send the soldiers riding away down a false trail while appearing to cooperate fully.
Hide the fugitive inside the caravan so the search ends empty-handed on site.
Hand the fugitive to the soldiers discreetly in exchange for the caravan's unhindered passage.
Persuade Captain Idris that the fugitive died crossing the salt flats, ending the hunt.
